new_content.name: Pandæmonium: Anabaseios (Savage)
new_content.description: High-end raid tier. Restrictions removed: treasure coffers now always appear, weekly reward restrictions removed, weekly entrance restrictions removed, players may proceed to any circle, and the Echo has been added.

new_content.name: Thaleia
new_content.description: Alliance raid added to Duty Roulette: Alliance Raids.

new_content.name: The Scions of the Seventh Dawn
new_content.description: Main scenario quest; rewards for Vesper Bay Aetheryte Tickets increased.

new_content.name: Back from the Wood
new_content.description: Main scenario quest; rewards for Vesper Bay Aetheryte Tickets increased.

new_content.name: The Black Wolf's Ultimatum
new_content.description: Main scenario quest; rewards for Vesper Bay Aetheryte Tickets increased.

new_content.name: Island Sanctuary
new_content.description: Players can speak with the felicitous furball to receive hints about realizing certain visions.

new_content.name: Khloe's Wondrous Tails
new_content.description: System for completing lines; rewards for Allagan tomestones of comedy increased.

new_content.name: Fields of Glory (Shatter)
new_content.description: PvP adjustment: data required to win decreased and data gain from defeating opposing players increased.

new_content.name: Xbox Series X|S Version
new_content.description: Major platform integration featuring open beta, SSO authentication, resolution options, and mouse/keyboard support.

housing.name: Felicitous Furball
housing.description: An NPC in the island sanctuary that provides hints for realizing visions.

glamour.name: Construct 06S Core
glamour.description: Mentioned as an item obtainable as a silver prize reward from Khloe's Wondrous Tails in the blog entry titled 'コンストラクト06Sの心核がクロの空想帳の銀賞の景品になってる！！.'
